description: Phase 2C — Multimedia artifacts: podcast (TTS) and video (Remotion). Leverages existing ~/Dev/ai-projects/remotion-studio for video. Reuses /generate router.

userStories.title: Implement generate-podcast handler
userStories.description: As a user, I want `/generate podcast <topic>` to produce a 3–10 minute MP3 explainer on the topic, optionally with two AI voices in conversation.
acceptanceCriteria: Two-stage pipeline: (1) LLM writes podcast script from wiki pages (single-host by default, --two-voice for dialogue), (2) TTS renders each line to audio, ffmpeg concatenates
TTS backend: default to Piper (local, free, lazy-install) — fallback to ElevenLabs / OpenAI TTS if ELEVENLABS_API_KEY or OPENAI_API_KEY present
Output: vaults/<vault>/artifacts/podcast/<topic>-<date>.mp3 + .meta.yaml + .script.md (the full script alongside for review)
Lazy-installs ffmpeg and piper if missing; prints voice selection options
Script generation prompts the LLM to cite wiki pages inline and produce a consumable spoken-word narrative, not a bulleted summary
userStories.notes: Two-voice dialogue is the NotebookLM killer feature — worth doing well. Piper voices are a bit robotic; document that tradeoff. — Done: generate-podcast handler at .claude/skills/generate-podcast/ with TTS priority ElevenLabs → OpenAI → Piper (default), single-host + --two-voice templates, --length short/medium/long mapping to ~150 wpm word targets, ffmpeg MP3 concat at VBR q2, .script.md kept alongside MP3 as primary re-renderable artifact. Sidecar captures tts-backend, voice, format, length-target, source-hash. Reuses select-pages.sh and source-hash.sh.

userStories.title: Implement generate-video handler with Remotion
userStories.description: As a user, I want `/generate video <topic>` to produce an animated explainer MP4 using the Remotion studio.
acceptanceCriteria: Reads from the existing ~/Dev/ai-projects/remotion-studio repo (symlink or path-ref in skill config)
Pipeline: LLM writes video script + scene list → selects/parameterises a Remotion composition → invokes `npx remotion render` → outputs MP4
Composition library: at minimum reuses the promo video V2–V9 compositions already in remotion-studio; adds a new 'wiki-explainer' composition tuned for topic overviews
Audio: reuses generate-podcast for voiceover (chain skills) — so video voiceover is just podcast output muxed into Remotion timeline
Documents the remotion-studio dependency and how to add new compositions
userStories.notes: The video compositions already exist. The bulk of work is the skill that picks a composition and parameterises it from wiki content.

userStories.title: Document Phase 2C in sites/docs
userStories.description: As a user, I want docs for generate-podcast and generate-video including TTS backend selection and Remotion composition customisation.
acceptanceCriteria: Add sites/docs/src/content/docs/features/generate-podcast.md with pipeline diagram, TTS backend comparison, sample output
Include a troubleshooting section for ffmpeg / piper / Remotion common errors
Mermaid flow diagrams on both pages
